examples.vote_description: A bill to repeal the Defense of Marriage Act and ensure respect for State regulation of marriage, and for other purposes.
examples.reason: Respect for Marriage Act — codifies same-sex and interracial marriage. Reproductive rights organizations like Planned Parenthood strongly supported this as part of their broader reproductive freedom and LGBTQ+ rights agenda.

examples.vote_description: A bill making further continuing appropriations and other extensions for the fiscal year ending September 30, 2025, and for other purposes.
examples.reason: Amendment to reinstate veteran federal employees fired without cause — federal employee unions strongly support protections against arbitrary dismissal of federal workers.

highlights.issue: Universal background checks for gun purchases
Grant legal status to DACA recipients
Require permits to carry concealed guns
